title: Closing Time
why_this_song: Closing Time by Semisonic (1998) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 17 times; first heard in: "Closing time, you don't have to go home"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "I know who I want to take me home"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "I know who I want to take me home"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Closing time, open all the doors"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Closing time, open all the doors"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Closing time, time for you to go out
To the places you will be from
Closing time, this room won't be open
Comes from some other beginning's end, yeah
I know who I want to take me home
I know who I want to take me home

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "home" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "home" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Closing time, open all the doors

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And let you out into the world
To the places you will be from
Comes from some other beginning's end, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Closing Time" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Closing Time", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Closing Time" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Closing Time" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Closing Time", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Closing Time", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
